{{Infobox character
| name = Yala the High Mason
| aliases = High Councilor Yala, High Mason, Yala
| children = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Meia]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Yala the High Mason|High Mason]], Councilor, [[High Councilor]], [[Consultant]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Guild]], High Council}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|, [[Masons]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|, [[Consultant's Guild|Consultant’s Guild]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Mason]], [[Consultant]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|, [[Gardener]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

''See also: [[Yala the High Mason Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala is a prominent leader within the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]], serving as the High [[Mason]] and as one of the three members of the High [[Council of Architects]]. A legendary figure among [[Masons]], she is recognized for her extensive combat experience and past exploits, including a mission where she reportedly infiltrated the [[Izyrians]] to halt a rebellion. Physically, she is described as a tall, weathered woman with tanned, wrinkled skin and long hair that is a mix of blond and gray, often worn in a single braid or tail. Yala holds significant authority, overseeing the [[Masons]]—an order that trains individuals in various professional fields to act as insiders for the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]]. As a [[High Councilor]], she is part of the leadership that represents the [[Am’haranai]] and manages critical [[Guild]] matters. Her leadership style is characterized by a stern, haughty, and dignified demeanor; she is known to be fiercely protective of the [[Guild]]'s secrets and authority, often clashing with others, including [[Shera]], whom she has historically viewed as an enemy or a criminal. Despite her rigid adherence to [[Guild]] law and hierarchy, she is also capable of making strategic judgments for the prosperity of the organization, particularly in the wake of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s death and the rising influence of the [[Regents]].}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A blond [[High Councilor]] and one of the three [[Architects]] of the High [[Council]], Yala is a combat-experienced [[Mason]] known among [[Consultants]] as a legend for stopping an [[Izyrian]] rebellion. After assigning [[Shera]] a mission and participating in discussions with [[Kerian]], she expressed satisfaction regarding [[Shera]]'s subsequent failure. While waiting in a hidden bay with an ornate chest, Yala attempted to seize the Heart from [[Shera]] and announced that both [[Shera]] and her own daughter, [[Meia]], should be detained for crimes against the [[Guild]]. Despite viewing the swearing-in of new [[Consultants]] as a religious duty, Yala spoke sourly at the High [[Council]] conference table and recalled a time when [[Meia]] once left her locked in a closet for an entire day.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">18</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala is someone [[Ayana]] mentions.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c2">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala is a character who gave [[Shera]] a mission.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala is a character who participates in the conversation with [[Shera]] and [[Kerian]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala is a Councilor.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala is a combat-experienced [[Mason]] in the history of the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c6">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala was happy about [[Shera]]'s failure.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala is a [[High Councilor]] and the mother of [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Yala the High Mason]] is one of the three [[Architects]] of the High [[Council]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala is a legend among the [[Consultants]] for infiltrating the [[Izyrians]] and stopping a rebellion.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala is a character who waits in the hidden bay with an ornate chest.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala announced that [[Meia]] and [[Shera]] should be detained for crimes against the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala once tried to take the Heart from [[Shera]] in the bay.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala takes the swearing-in of new [[Consultants]] as a religious duty.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c23">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala is [[Meia]]'s mother.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c24">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala sat at the High [[Council]] conference table.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Yala's daughter]] once left her locked in a closet for a full day.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala is a blond Councilor.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Yala spoke sourly.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Yala is a gray-blond woman who leads the [[Masons]] and was previously mentioned by [[Shera]]. Though she expressed skepticism regarding [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s resurrection, she had earlier contacted [[Shera]] to arrange for his early death. During a chaotic event on the docks, Yala's voice rose above the deck's commotion as she scrutinized a cloud within a blade and addressed someone as [[Guild]] Head. Having survived the encounter, she emerged as the newly appointed High [[Mason]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Yala is unlikely to believe [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] has risen from the grave.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Yala is a character mentioned by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c5">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Yala contacted [[Shera]] to kill [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] early.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c12">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Yala is a person [[Shera]] expected to see on the dock.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Yala is a woman with gray-blond hair who leads [[Masons]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Yala survived the event.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Yala is the newly appointed High [[Mason]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Yala is a character whose voice rises above the commotion on deck.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Yala scrutinized the cloud in the blade and called someone '[[Guild]] Head'.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A member of the [[Masons]] trained in their lower levels, Yala serves as a High [[Mason]], an active [[Gardener]], and a member of the High [[Council]]. After delivering a message from the [[Regents]] to [[Shera]], Yala ordered her to kill rioters and later appointed her as [[Guild]] Head. Despite acting as one of [[Shera]]'s [[Consultants]], Yala's actions proved the [[Regents]] were untrustworthy and led [[Lucan]] to fear that the High [[Mason]] might murder him. During a meeting where Yala led [[Shera]]'s entourage, the weather-beaten individual with yellow-and-gray hair ordered [[Shera]] to be shot before being physically dragged away by [[Kerian]] and [[Tyril]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">28</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala is a member of the [[Masons]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala told [[Shera]] the [[Regents]]' message.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[High Councilor]] Yala ordered [[Shera]] to kill the rioters.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala wore black without a shroud over his face.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala is one of [[Shera]]'s [[Consultants]] and was surrounded by dead or dying [[Blackwatch]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala is a person [[Lucan]] believes might have had selfish motivations.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Zhen warns [[Lucan]] not to tell Yala about his actions.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] considers confronting Yala.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Lucan]] fears Yala might murder him.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala appointed [[Shera]] as [[Guild]] Head.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala was assigned to the [[Masons]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala wears blacks up to her neck.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala calls [[Lucan]] 'Reader', '[[Gardener]]', or '[[Consultant]]'.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala is a High [[Mason]] and an active [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala is a person who proved why the [[Regents]] cannot be trusted.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala is part of the High [[Council]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala was critical of [[Shera]]'s decision regarding the [[Champions]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala habitually underestimates [[Gardeners]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala is expected to follow the rules of the [[Consultant]]’s [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala was trained in the lower levels of the [[Mason house]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c17">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala would never dare lie to a [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala is the High [[Mason]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The High [[Mason]] is present at the meeting.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala led [[Shera]]'s entourage to the meeting.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala has yellow-and-gray hair and a weather-beaten face.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala ordered [[Shera]] to be shot.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala is a character who was physically dragged off by [[Kerian]] and [[Tyril]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Yala is someone the [[Guild]] would be split against if [[Lucan]] and [[Shera]] were pardoned.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“We have,” Yala said, firmly taking the reins of the conversation back from Kerian.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“High Councilor Yala,” Meia said, “to her mother.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“My daughter left me locked in a closet for a full day. Where is she?”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Yala’s eyes narrowed, scrutinizing the cloud in the blade. Then she fell to one knee. “Guild Head,” she said.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Yala proved to me why they can’t trust the Regents.”<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Guild]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Readers]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
